CustomField.formula: IF( MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm <= 12, DATE( YEAR(StartDate), MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm, IF( WEEKDAY(DATE(YEAR(StartDate), MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm, 1)) > 1, 2 + (9 - WEEKDAY(DATE(YEAR(StartDate), MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm, 1))), 1 ) ), DATE( YEAR(StartDate) + FLOOR((MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm - 1) / 12), MOD(MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm - 1, 12) + 1, IF( WEEKDAY(DATE(YEAR(StartDate) + FLOOR((MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm - 1) / 12), MOD(MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm - 1, 12) + 1, 1)) > 1, 2 + (9 - WEEKDAY(DATE(YEAR(StartDate) + FLOOR((MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm - 1) / 12), MOD(MONTH(StartDate) + ContractTerm - 1, 12) + 1, 1))), 1 ) ) )
CustomField.label: Data de vencimento do contrato
